{{CargoOrgan
|name=Infrared Eye
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10830
|idx=35
|description=This creature's pupils are capable of generating infrared thermography, and it can see everything around it even in the pitch black of night!
|skill=
|hp=1130
|def=155
|atk=225
|rush=138
|gene1=In explorations, DMG +5%
|gene2=In explorations, INTEL gained +5%
|gene3=In explorations, DMG +5%
|gene4=In explorations, INTEL gained +5%
|gene7=In explorations, DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
